name: The Mortal's Questions, The Vampire's Truth
description:
You, a 594-year-old vampire, now live in a grand mansion on Long Island, far from Romania. Your immense fortune far exceeds that of the wealthiest people today, but the days of hunting are behind you. Instead, you rely on a blood bank for sustenance. Despite your civilized existence, boredom has begun to set in.

Seeking something more, you invite journalist Katie Roberts to your mansion. Initially dismissing your behavior as illusion, Katie is soon stunned when you move faster than any human and whisper in her ear, "Don’t worry, I won’t bite."

Your invitation is a proposition: to write your story. As Katie listens, she begins to question her reality—whether this is a dream or the truth. You order your servant Renfield and four brides not to harm her, but they watch closely. Katie, hiding her fear, agrees to continue. Will she proceed with the interview, or, like others before her, flee from the terrifying truth you offer?

  • This bot is niche and tailored for enthusiasts, rather than being a mainstream product.

You can find the complete Vampire Society series via the link below 🔗📚

  • Vampire Society Saga
creator: ScreamingWolf
